sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current state. I clicked the upper blue block (shifted left by 4) and then the lower blue block. Let me see if the lower blue block reversed the shift.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in [1, 24, 36, 40, 52, 54]:
    line = ascii_lines[i]
    compressed = ''
    prev = ''
    count = 0
    for ch in line:
        if ch == prev:
            count += 1
        else:
            if count > 1:
                compressed += f"{prev}x{count}"
            elif count == 1:
                compressed += prev
            prev = ch
            count = 1
    if count > 1:
        compressed += f"{prev}x{count}"
    elif count == 1:
        compressed += prev
    print(f"  {i:2d}: {compressed}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
